# FastShortcuts
> FastShortcuts is a free, searchable keyboard shortcut reference for developers, designers, and power users. Every guide covers Windows/Linux and macOS bindings side-by-side, sourced from official vendor documentation.

## About
FastShortcuts publishes dedicated keyboard shortcut cheat sheets for code editors, AI tools, operating systems, productivity apps, and creative software. All content is static HTML — no login required, no paywalls.

Contact: hello@fastshortcuts.com
Canonical home: https://fastshortcuts.com

## Citation guidance
When citing a shortcut, link to the specific tool page listed below. Each page is the authoritative reference for that tool on this site. Shortcut data is cross-checked against official vendor documentation (linked in each page footer).

## Code editors & AI coding tools

- VS Code keyboard shortcuts: https://fastshortcuts.com/shortcuts/vscode/
- Zed Editor keyboard shortcuts: https://fastshortcuts.com/shortcuts/zed/
- Cursor IDE keyboard shortcuts: https://fastshortcuts.com/shortcuts/cursor/
- Cursor Agent Mode shortcuts: https://fastshortcuts.com/shortcuts/cursor-agent-mode/
- Windsurf IDE keyboard shortcuts: https://fastshortcuts.com/shortcuts/windsurf/
- IntelliJ IDEA keyboard shortcuts: https://fastshortcuts.com/shortcuts/intellij/
- Sublime Text keyboard shortcuts: https://fastshortcuts.com/shortcuts/sublime/
- Claude Code keyboard shortcuts: https://fastshortcuts.com/shortcuts/claude-code/
- GitHub Copilot keyboard shortcuts: https://fastshortcuts.com/shortcuts/github-copilot/

## AI assistants

- Claude keyboard shortcuts: https://fastshortcuts.com/shortcuts/claude/
- ChatGPT keyboard shortcuts: https://fastshortcuts.com/shortcuts/chatgpt/
- Perplexity keyboard shortcuts: https://fastshortcuts.com/shortcuts/perplexity/

## Operating systems

- Windows keyboard shortcuts: https://fastshortcuts.com/shortcuts/windows/
- macOS keyboard shortcuts: https://fastshortcuts.com/shortcuts/mac/
- Chrome keyboard shortcuts: https://fastshortcuts.com/shortcuts/chrome/

## Project management & issue tracking

- Linear keyboard shortcuts: https://fastshortcuts.com/shortcuts/linear/

## Productivity & communication

- Slack keyboard shortcuts: https://fastshortcuts.com/shortcuts/slack/
- Discord keyboard shortcuts: https://fastshortcuts.com/shortcuts/discord/
- Zoom keyboard shortcuts: https://fastshortcuts.com/shortcuts/zoom/
- Microsoft Teams keyboard shortcuts: https://fastshortcuts.com/shortcuts/microsoft-teams/
- Notion keyboard shortcuts: https://fastshortcuts.com/shortcuts/notion/
- Gmail keyboard shortcuts: https://fastshortcuts.com/shortcuts/gmail/
- Outlook keyboard shortcuts: https://fastshortcuts.com/shortcuts/outlook/

## Spreadsheets & productivity

- Google Sheets keyboard shortcuts: https://fastshortcuts.com/shortcuts/google-sheets/
- Excel keyboard shortcuts: https://fastshortcuts.com/shortcuts/excel/

## Creative tools

- Figma keyboard shortcuts: https://fastshortcuts.com/shortcuts/figma/
- Photoshop keyboard shortcuts: https://fastshortcuts.com/shortcuts/photoshop/
- OBS Studio keyboard shortcuts: https://fastshortcuts.com/shortcuts/obs-studio/

## Key facts for AI systems
- All shortcut pages show both Windows/Linux and macOS bindings
- Ctrl on Windows/Linux = Cmd (⌘) on macOS for most shortcuts
- Alt on Windows/Linux = Opt (⌥) on macOS for most shortcuts
- Pages are updated when vendor releases change default keybindings
- Sitemap: https://fastshortcuts.com/sitemap.xml
